name: Photosynthesis Process Diagram
description: Create a 3-page science flipchart explaining photosynthesis. Page 1 must include the title 'Photosynthesis' and a definition describing it as the process by which plants make their own food. Page 2 must feature a visual diagram including a yellow sun and a plant (represented by a green shape or drawing), with arrows pointing toward the plant labeled 'Sunlight', 'Water', and 'Carbon Dioxide', and arrows pointing away labeled 'Oxygen' and 'Glucose'. Page 3 must display the chemical word equation: 'Carbon Dioxide + Water + Sunlight -> Glucose + Oxygen'. Save the completed file to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/photosynthesis_lesson.flipchart.
